title: Device Settings - All toggles ON - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle buttons in Device Settings tabs persist their ON state after closing and reopening tabs, settings page, or restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
3. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Navigate through all tabs (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications) and set all toggle buttons to ON.
5. Close the current tab and reopen it — observe the toggle states.
6. Return to the Device Settings main screen, then reopen the same tab — observe the toggle states.
7. Navigate back to the Home screen, then reopen Device Settings for the same device — observe the toggle states.
8. Fully close (force stop) the Poly Studio Mobile app and relaunch it.
9. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings and check all toggle states across all tabs.
expected: Toggle buttons should reset to their default OFF state when closing and reopening a tab, returning to Device Settings, or restarting the app.
